texto: I was a pilot and flying hang gliders, paragliders, aerobatics airplanes, and then I discovered skydiving. Free fall. Free. With nothing around you, just a parachute on your back. And you go down. But you don't feel like you're going down. Total freedom.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Yves Rossy: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I was a pilot and flying hang gliders, paragliders, aerobatics airplanes, and then I discovered s…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que lideranca, flying, free pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de free e fall.

frase_original: I was a pilot and flying hang gliders, paragliders, aerobatics airplanes, and then I discovered skydiving. Free fall. Free. With nothing around you, just a parachute on your back. And you go down. But you don't feel like you're going down. Total freedom.
